welcome.content: 👋 Parents, please complete this questionnaire to provide a holistic overview of your child, including their learning profile as well as their social, emotional, mental health, speech and language and sensory needs.

background_1.question: Why are you seeking an assessment now?

background_2.question: Which areas are of concern? (tick all that apply)
background_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_3.question: Do you need this report for a specific reason?
background_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_4.question: Has any prior diagnosis been suggested?
background_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_5.question: Current course type
background_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_1.question: Who lives at home with the student? (term-time)
family_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_2.question: Family history (tick all that apply):
family_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_4.question: Languages spoken at home
family_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_3.question: Any sensory sensitivities affecting study?
health_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_1.question: Has your child changed schools at any point?
education_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_2.question: If yes, please explain the reasons for the move(s).

education_3.question: Were there any periods of absence from school or difficulties attending school?
education_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_4.question: If yes, please explain in more detail.

education_5.question: Has your child ever been excluded, or placed on a reduced timetable?
education_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_6.question: If yes, please explain in more detail.

education_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_9.question: Current A-Level / IB subjects + predicted grades

education_10.question: Mock exam performance vs predicted A-Level grades
education_10.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_11.question: Have any access arrangements been used at school in the past?
education_11.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_12.question: Has the student had any previous EP / SpLD / SALT / OT / CAMHS assessment?
education_12.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_13.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_14.question: If yes, when was the EHCP awarded?

education_15.question: Plans after A-Levels / Sixth Form
education_15.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_9.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_16.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_17.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

strengths_1.question: Interests and hobbies - what do you do to relax / for enjoyment?

strengths_2.question: What are your strengths, as you see them?

strengths_3.question: Anything else you would like the assessor to know?

closing_message.content: Thank you for completing the questionnaire. Your responses have been recorded and will be reviewed by the educational psychology team.

complete.content: Thank you so much for completing this assessment!
